What I do

A full-funnel operator, end to end

Strategy, performance media, lifecycle, analytics, and design, under one roof.

Go-to-Market Execution

Full-funnel campaigns that drive acquisition, engagement, retention, and revenue, aligning stakeholders, budgets, and channels to measurable outcomes.

CLM & Lifecycle

Segmented journeys across SMS, email, in-app, and automation. Behavioral targeting to improve activation, retention, and reactivation.

Performance Marketing

Paid media across Meta, Google, and TikTok, sharpened with audience targeting, creative testing, remarketing, and conversion optimization.

Analytics & Growth Insights

SQL, Databricks, GA4, and Looker to turn campaign, behavior, and revenue data into business cases and growth recommendations.

Conversion & Funnel Optimization

Landing pages and websites in Framer, Wix, and WordPress, improving UX, conversion rates, and lead quality.

AI, Automation & MarOps

Workflows with CleverTap, ManyChat, Mailchimp, and AI tools to streamline operations, customer comms, and reporting.
